content:
# Chime Software Engineer Intern - Agent Tools Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Chime Software Engineer Intern - Agent Tools internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** SF
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Chime
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Chime is offering a Software Engineer Intern - Agent Tools internship position in SF. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Chime's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Chime interview and increase your chances of success.
